name_cn:
【Horizontal Lady D-Joy】Medium Blue Denim
Brand new Lady D-Joy bag, many people should have been attracted by this narrow version. A huge hit 🔥, the bag comes with one long and one short shoulder strap, multiple carrying methods 🙋🏻‍♀️, can be crossbody or underarm, looking beautiful and cool when worn. Classic quilted design 🥅, elegant and stylish
size: 22.5*6*11.5cm
model: 9034
